truthExposure.note: Higher truth exposure unlocks understanding and routes, but also increases danger.

sanityPressure.note: Represents mental strain, not simple HP.

corruptionOrAssimilation.note: Can grant power, change perception, reduce humanity, or unlock eldritch routes.

occultContact.note: Depth of contact with cults, relics, entities, dreams, rituals, or forbidden texts.

socialNormalcy.note: Lower values make ordinary life harder to maintain.

personalGoal.note: Tracks the player character's chosen life goal, ambition, or obsession.
